PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/kamis/items" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "API OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "API: $_" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totalCnt:', d['totalCnt'], '| fetched:', d['fetched'], '| sampleOnly:', d['sampleOnly'], '| rows:', len\(d['rows']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('price',[]\)[0] if d.get\('price'\) else d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pl=d.get\('price',[]\); print\('count:', len\(pl\)\); print\(json.dumps\(pl[0] if pl else d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pl=d.get\('price',[]\); print\('rows:', len\(pl\)\); print\('sample:', pl[0].get\('productName'\), pl[0].get\('dpr1'\)\) if pl else print\(d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pl=d.get\('price',[]\); print\('entries:', len\(pl\)\); print\('item rows:', len\(pl[0].get\('item',[]\)\)\) if pl else 0")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['crops']; print\(json.dumps\(c, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('error_code:', d.get\('error_code'\)\); pl=d.get\('price',[]\); print\('entries:', len\(pl\) if isinstance\(pl,list\) else pl\); [print\(' cls=',p.get\('productclscode'\),'cap=',p.get\('caption',''\)[-25:]\) for p in \(pl if isinstance\(pl,list\) else []\)[:4]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('error_code:', d.get\('error_code'\)\); pl=d.get\('price',[]\); print\('type:', type\(pl\).__name__, '| entries:', len\(pl\) if isinstance\(pl,list\) else pl\)")
